data.title: BNB Drops Below 870 USDT with a 1.19% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 26, 2026, 09:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 870 USDT and is now trading at 869.98999 USDT, with a narrowed 1.19% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Oasys Faces Investment Warning from South Korean Exchanges
data.description: The Digital Asset eXchange Alliance (DAXA) in South Korea has issued an investment warning for Oasys (OAS) on its member exchanges. According to NS3.AI, this decision indicates heightened caution for investors dealing with OAS on these trading platforms. The alliance's action highlights concerns about the asset's risk profile.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 31 BTC Over Past Month
data.description: El Salvador's government has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 8 BTC in the past week and 31 BTC over the past month. According to Odaily, the country's total Bitcoin holdings now stand at 7,543.37 BTC, valued at $661 million.

data.title: Ripple's XRP Sales Reach $109 Billion Since 2012
data.description: Since its inception in 2012, Ripple and its executives have sold over 58.5 billion XRP tokens, amounting to approximately $109 billion. According to NS3.AI, Ripple was initially allocated 100 billion XRP, and their current holdings are about 41.485 billion XRP. Ripple has indicated that the purpose of these sales is to address concerns about centralization. During this period, the price of XRP has increased by approximately 31,000%.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $86,075 and $88,972 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $87,807, down by -0.73%.

data.title: Token Unlock Wave Approaches as $200M+ Supply Set to Enter Market
data.description:
The final week of January is shaping up to be a key test for several major crypto assets, as a dense cluster of token unlocks prepares to introduce significant new supply into the market.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/token-unlock-wave-approaches-as-200m-supply-set-to-enter-market/

data.title: Gold-Backed Tokens Transferred Within Wintermute
data.description: A transfer of gold-backed tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 16:53, 586 XAUt tokens were moved from Wintermute Deposit to Wintermute.

data.title: The El Salvadoran government has increased its holdings by 8 BTC in the past 7 days, bringing its total holdings to 7,543.37 BTC.
data.description: The El Salvadoran government has acquired 8 bitcoins in the past 7 days and 31 bitcoins in the past 30 days, bringing its total bitcoin holdings to 7,543.37 bitcoins, with a total value of $661 million.

data.title: Solana saw a single-day increase of over 52,000 tokens issued, marking a five-month high.
data.description: According to SOLSCAN data, Solana saw a new token issuance of over 52,000 in 24 hours, reaching its highest level in five months.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Announces Transition to New Reporting Platform by 2026
data.description:
The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has announced that licensed corporations, virtual asset service providers licensed by the SFC, and related entities must transition to a new suspicious transaction reporting platform by February 2, 2026. According to Foresight News, this platform, known as the Second Generation Suspicious Transaction Report and Management System (STREAMS 2), will replace the current system to enhance automation and analytical capabilities, thereby improving the efficiency of analyzing suspicious transaction reports and disseminating financial intelligence.

Starting February 2, 2026, STREAMS 2 will be the sole channel for submitting suspicious transaction reports. Licensed entities will be able to submit reports using XML format, specified PDF format, or online forms.

data.title: Crypto Trader Rebuilds Positions in Ethereum and Bitcoin
data.description: A prominent crypto trader known as 'Maji' has re-entered the market with significant positions in Ethereum and Bitcoin. According to ChainCatcher, after being liquidated earlier today, the trader increased their Ethereum holdings and initiated new Bitcoin positions in the afternoon. As of the latest update, Maji holds over $4.6 million in Ethereum and Bitcoin long positions. Specifically, the trader has acquired 1,500 units of Ethereum with 25x leverage and 3 units of Bitcoin with 40x leverage.

data.title: After a two-year hiatus, a whale went long on Aave lending, purchasing 686 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a two-year hiatus, a whale deposited 2,000 ETH (worth $5.76 million) into Aave V3, lent out 2 million USDC, and bought 686 ETH. Currently, this whale holds a total of 10,759 ETH through three different addresses, with a total value of $31.24 million.

data.title: Colombia's AFP Protección Introduces Bitcoin Exposure Fund
data.description: AFP Protección, Colombia's second-largest pension fund manager, has announced the introduction of a Bitcoin exposure fund. According to NS3.AI, the company's president, Juan David Correa, confirmed this development in a recent interview. This initiative highlights the increasing institutional interest in cryptocurrencies within the pension sector in Latin America.

data.title: Japan Moves Toward First Crypto ETFs as Regulators Target 2028 Launch
data.description:
Japan is on track to approve its first cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds as early as 2028, marking a decisive shift in one of the world’s most conservative digital-asset regulatory environments. The country’s Financial Services Agency(FSA) is currently reviewing revisions to the Investment Trusts Act that would formally recognize cryptocurrencies as “specified assets” eligible for ETF structures.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/japan-moves-toward-first-crypto-etfs-as-regulators-target-2028-launch/

data.title: ETHZilla buys 2 plane engines for $12 million amid tokenization focus
data.description:
ETHZilla acquired two aircraft engines for $12. 2 million, entering the aviation leasing market amid a global engine supply crunch.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethzilla-buys-2-plane-engines-tokenization/

data.title: MetaPlanet recorded a loss of approximately $679 million due to quarterly Bitcoin market capitalization volatility.
data.description: Japanese listed company MetaPlanet announced that it has revised its earnings forecast for fiscal year 2025 upward, with revenue increasing from 6.8 billion yen to 8.905 billion yen and operating profit rising to 6.287 billion yen. However, due to the quarterly market value fluctuation of Bitcoin, an assessment loss of 104.636 billion yen (approximately US$679 million) was recorded, resulting in an ordinary loss of 98.558 billion yen.

data.title: Shiba Inu Faces Challenges Despite Entering Demand Zone
data.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB) has entered its annual demand zone, a price area historically linked to substantial rallies, such as a 296% increase in 2024. According to NS3.AI, token burn activity has intensified significantly, with one transaction removing over 28 million tokens, thereby increasing supply-side scarcity. Despite the presence of bullish technical patterns and accumulation by large holders, concerns persist due to declining ecosystem usage metrics. These factors raise doubts about SHIB's potential to overcome key resistance levels.

data.title: Noble protocol to sunset Cosmos appchain, launch EVM-based Layer 1
data.description:
Noble is moving from Cosmos to a standalone EVM Layer 1, focusing on stablecoin applications, FX products, and broader DeFi integration with maintained IBC support.
source: https://catenaa.com/blockchain/noble-protocol-to-sunset-cosmos-appchain-launch-evm-based-layer-1/

data.title: Japan plans framework that could permit crypto ETFs by 2028: Nikkei
data.description:
Japan’s financial regulator is weighing rule changes that could allow crypto assets to qualify for ETFs, signaling a possible shift in retail access.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/japan-considers-crypto-etfs-2028-nikkei?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance: Airdrops will be available at 17:00, with a minimum requirement of 241 Alpha Points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available at 17:00 (UTC+8) today. Users holding at least 241 Binance Alpha Credits are eligible to claim the tokens. It's on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is depleted or the event ends. Further details will be announced separately.
